steps.title: Set up the substitution
steps.content: We need to find the sum of interior angles for a polygon with 35 sides. Substitute $x = 35$ into the given function.

steps.title: Calculate f(35)
steps.content:
$$f(35) = 180(35 - 2)$$
$$f(35) = 180(33)$$
$$f(35) = 5940$$
The sum of the interior angles for a 35-sided polygon is 5940 degrees.
